task.title: Initial use case: codebase-aware provider abstraction redesign
task.problem_statement: Design the best implementation plan for adding a vendor-neutral LLM provider layer to an existing AI application without breaking current integrations.
success_criteria: Keep per-request observability and cost accounting
Support new providers without changing orchestration code
constraints: Prefer incremental rollout over large rewrites
Assume a Python backend and existing prompt workflows

context_sources.label: Product brief
context_sources.content: The existing app uses a single LLM vendor directly in service code. The redesign should isolate provider concerns, preserve auditability, and support both API-backed and CLI-backed agents.
